privileged_info_summary: Task tests bulk user provisioning from a CSV roster file with four users: b.wayne (Shift Supervisor), d.prince (Advanced Viewer), a.curry (Viewer with trimmed whitespace), and c.kent (pre-existing user for idempotency testing). All user data is synthetic and embedded in setup_task.sh, featuring fictional DC Comics/DCEU character names (Bruce Wayne, Diana Prince, Arthur Curry, Clark Kent) with fictional email domains (gotham.sec, atlantis.net, dailyplanet.com). The roster file is created at /home/ga/Documents/security_roster.csv. A custom 'Shift Supervisor' role is created during setup. The c.kent user is deliberately pre-created with a different role (Live Viewer) than what the CSV specifies (Viewer) to verify the task correctly implements idempotency (i.e., does not overwrite existing users).
